[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Banners](https://www.banners.com/banners) 3. Fence Banners # Fence Banners ### Custom Wrapped Fence Banners ![sponsor fence banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/afe6a0d7672f4e7aacb7c203376338d5.png) * [Material Options](#5d75c445-23a5-467c-9321-033894ceff02) * [Artwork Specs](#7c13c54d-c368-4bd6-830b-d3ae47aca67b) * [Production Times](#02b1cf34-ecdf-4e4d-89db-e1b57a4cc7b2) * [Payment Options](#4c75910d-ee94-4124-a026-68448ef6c2bd) * [Shipping Guidelines](#2a2161ac-95a2-4deb-863c-b380b0e45988) * [How to Install](#375c3db9-6c0a-4814-bdb8-599c9fbb7336) ### Fence Banners Fence banners are available in multiple materials. We can print your fence banner or wrap in either our 8oz mesh material or in our 13oz scrim vinyl or our 18oz heavy duty scrim vinyl. Please read below for more information about our fence banner and wrap materials. #### Mesh Fence Banner Material The [mesh material](https://www.banners.com/types-of-banners-material-comparison) is on 8 oz PVC polyester with a 37% air-flow. There are crisscrossed fibers which create a printable surface. You can see through this material to some extent, but you can still see the printed graphic. Most commonly used outdoors such as a displayed at a construction site or ball field fences. We can print full-color images and text, while also printing graphics and logos. #### Solid Scrim Vinyl Fence Banner Materials [Vinyl banners](https://www.banners.com/types-of-banners-material-comparison) are printed on high-quality 13oz scrim vinyl banner material or 18oz heavy duty scrim vinyl banner material. The scrim vinyl is a woven fiber inside the material that gives the banner extra strength and durability. You can use fence banners both indoor and outdoor for many different occasions. Vinyl banners are digitally-printed in full color. You can select one of our banner templates to customize in the online designer with backgrounds, clip-art and text. You can also upload your own images. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. Not sure which fence banner material is right for you? [Click here to request a sample packet of materials.](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) #### Fence Banner & Fence Wrap Finishing Options Fence banners and wraps are finished with heat-welded hems and grommets. The hems are folded behind the banner, then heated until the material welds together. Grommets are placed every 2–4 feet around the perimeter of the banner. The grommets are used to help hang the banner. **Did we answer all your questions?** If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you. #### Artwork Guidelines The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you. #### Artwork/Order Proofs If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork
